subtitle.line1: We turn your old contacts into booked calls without spending more on ads.
subtitle.line2: We only get paid when you do.

demoForm.fineprint: No sign-up. Opens WhatsApp with a live AI.

errors.missingFields: Please fill in both fields (min 5 chars for the niche).
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in an hour.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

upfrontCost.title: Upfront Cost
upfrontCost.mission: Pay only from revenue we generate

compliance.title: We Move Fast. Your Reputation Stays Intact.
compliance.subtitle: Every conversation follows your brand guidelines, respects opt-outs, and meets GDPR standards. No shortcuts.

gdpr.title: Privacy by Design
gdpr.description: Contacts who opt out are removed instantly. Data stays in EU-compliant infrastructure. Every message includes an easy exit. Your legal team will have nothing to flag.

brand.title: Your Voice, Not Ours
brand.description: The AI learns your tone, your product language, and your boundaries. If a conversation goes off-topic, it gets flagged before it reaches your contact. You stay in control.

calculator.title: Lead Awakening Audit
calculator.subtitle: There's revenue sitting in your unclosed leads, let's unlock it

results.qualified: How many book a call with you
results.revenueLtv: New Lifetime Revenue with AI reactivation
results.profitLtv: New Lifetime Profit with AI reactivation

investment.spent: What You Paid To Get These Leads
investment.freshAdsSentence1: Fresh ads would cost {{amount}} to reach the same result.
investment.freshAdsSentence2: You already paid {{amount}} for these leads.

charts.cacSubtitle: Cost per acquired customer at each scenario
charts.cacFootnote: * CAC = your original ad spend ÷ customers closed in this scenario. Lower response rates mean each closed customer costs more.
charts.breakevenNarrative: You break even at deal #{{deal}}. The remaining {{profitDeals}} deals are pure profit.
charts.breakevenNarrativeWeeks: Break even: deal #{{deal}} · week {{week}}, {{profitDeals}} profit deals by week {{totalWeeks}}.
charts.funnelsFootnote: * Manual follow-up typically closes 2-4% of dead leads since humans drop follow-ups. AI reactivation depends on your data and offer.

calculator.step2Label: Step 2 — See what you're sitting on

hero.narrative: Out of {{total}} leads, ~{{replied}} will reply. ~{{book}} will book a call. ~{{buy}} will buy.

advanced.showAsHint: Switch to Profit to see contribution profit instead of gross revenue. Gross margin is the share of each deal left after hard costs (product, fulfillment, delivery).
advanced.dealTypeHint: Switch to Recurring for subscription or retainer models. Months retained is the average number of months a customer stays before churning. Deal value is multiplied by this to estimate lifetime value.
advanced.decayHint: Some of your dead leads are unreachable (bounced, opted-out, duplicates). Adjust for a more honest reachable pool.
advanced.decayTooltip: Typical ranges: 3-8% for fresh databases (under 6 months old), 8-12% for mixed dead databases (6-18 months, the common case), 20-30% for very old ones (2+ years). WhatsApp reach tends toward the lower end since phone numbers change less than emails.
advanced.paceHint: How many reactivated deals your team can close per week. Sets the timeline on the break-even chart.

cta.subtitle: Want to walk through your real numbers together?
cta.label: Let's have a quick chat
cta.waMessage: Hey Gabriel! I just did the Lead Awakening Audit: I have {{leads}} dormant leads at {{dealValue}} per deal, which puts {{revenue}} in recoverable revenue. How can we unlock it?
cta.waMessageProfit: Hey Gabriel! I just did the Lead Awakening Audit: I have {{leads}} dormant leads at {{dealValue}} per deal, which puts {{revenue}} in recoverable profit. How can we unlock it?

demo.title: See the platform behind the results
demo.subtitle: Watch how a real conversation goes from cold lead to booked call, automatically.

bottomCta.title: Only 5 Active Partners at a Time
bottomCta.quote: We stay intentionally hands-on with every partner.  This isn’t a plug-and-play AI tool. The results come from understanding your sales process, where your leads come from, and how people actually buy from you.
bottomCta.meta: I reply personally. If it’s not a fit, I’ll tell you fast.

abdulla.quote: We already use a great system, so the tech isn't the issue. Gabriel re-engaged leads we'd completely lost touch with, and it never felt automated, just natural conversations.
abdulla.name: Abdulla Dilimi

diederik.quote: Gabriel didn't just set it and walked away. He understood our contacts and tuned the tone, the results showed. Felt more like a consultant than a tool.
diederik.name: Diederik van de Laarschot
